gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/358)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/358)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي رَجُلٍ قِيلَ لَهُ فَعَلْتَ كَذَا وَ كَذَا قَالَ لَا وَ اللَّهِ مَا فَعَلْتُهُ وَ قَدْ فَعَلَهُ فَقَالَ كَذِبَةٌ كَذَبَهَا يَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ مِنْهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said regarding a man to whom it was said, ‘You did such and such’. He said, ‘No, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, I did not do it’, and he had done it. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘A lie he has lied it. He should seek Forgiveness of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> from it’.
en.sarwar: 19. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has narrated the following: “This is about the case of a man who after being asked, ‘Did you do such and such work?’ says, ‘No, by Allah, I have not done it’ when in fact he has done it. Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amz’r al-Mu’minin, Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is a lie that he has spoken and he must ask Allah for forgiveness.’”
